summary: Iteration 107: Tested Documents/Paperwork section in Pet Profile Health Vault, Emergency page pet selection, Product wishlist API, Service Desk Pet Parents/Profiles views, and Soul Score explanation text. Fixed critical bug: FileText icon was not imported in UnifiedPetPage.jsx causing page crash.

fixed_issues.issue: FileText icon not imported from lucide-react causing ReferenceError and page crash on Health Vault tab

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings: 6 unescaped apostrophe characters in UnifiedPetPage.jsx (lines 102, 114, 146, 163, 687) - minor, not blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Documents & Paperwork section shows 6 document types in Health Vault tab, 2) Emergency page bundles have pet selection dropdown (visible when logged in), 3) Wishlist API (POST/GET/DELETE) working correctly, 4) Service Desk has Pet Parents (25) and Pet Profiles (28) views, 5) Soul Score explanation text 'Questions marked with ★ count towards your Pet's Soul Score' is visible in Detailed View tab.

documents_paperwork_section.details: 6 document types visible: Vaccination Certificate, KCI Registration, Microchip Certificate, Pet Insurance, Travel Documents, Other Documents. View All Documents and Upload Document buttons present.

emergency_pet_selection.details: Pet selection dropdown with 'For which pet?' label implemented in bundle cards. Pet name and pet_id passed to cart when adding bundle.

wishlist_api.details: POST /api/member/wishlist/add, GET /api/member/wishlist, DELETE /api/member/wishlist/{id} all working. Heart button on ProductDetailPage calls API correctly.

service_desk_views.details: Pet Parents view shows 25 members with name, email, phone. Pet Profiles view shows 28 pets with name, breed, owner, Soul Score percentage.

soul_score_explanation.details: Text 'Questions marked with ★ count towards your Pet's Soul Score' visible in Detailed View tab under Soul Questionnaire section.
